search:java-spring-cloud-kafka:java spri.content:
- **Latest Version**: Spring Cloud Stream Binder Kafka version 3.2.0.RELEASE as of April 1, 2026.
  
- **Key Config Options**:
  - `spring.cloud.stream.bindings.input.destination`: Specifies the Kafka topic for input bindings.
  - `spring.cloud.stream.bindings.output.destination`: Specifies the Kafka topic for output bindings.
  - `spring.cloud.stream.kafka.binder.configuration.auto.offset.reset`: Sets the offset reset policy (e.g., `earliest`, `latest`).
  
- **CLI Commands**:
  - To add Spring Cloud Stream Binder Kafka to your Maven project, use:
    ```bash
    mvn dependency:add -DgroupId=org.springframework.cloud -DartifactId=spring-cloud-starter-stream-kafka -Dversion=3.2.0.RELEASE
    ```
  - To refresh the environment and reset partition count, use:
    ```bash
    ./mvnw spring-boot:run -Dspring-boot.run.arguments="--spring.cloud.stream.kafka.binder.configuration.auto.offset.reset=earliest"
    ```

- **GitHub Release Notes**:
  - Check [Releases](https://github.com/spring-cloud/spring-cloud-stream/releases) for detailed information on version 3.2.0.RELEASE and other versions.
  
- **Documentation Links**:
  - [Spring Cloud Stream Kafka Binder Reference Guide](https://docs.spring.io/spring-cloud-stream/docs/current/reference/htmlsingle/#spring-cloud-stream-binder-kafka)
  - [Spring Cloud Stream Kafka Integration](https://www.baeldung.com/spring-cloud-stream-kafka-integration)

- **Latest Version**: Spring Cloud Kafka Streams 3.0.0
- **Key Config Options**:
  - `spring.cloud.stream.kafka.streams.binder.applicationId`
  - `spring.cloud.stream.bindings.input.destination`
  - `spring.cloud.stream.bindings.output.destination`
- **CLI Commands**:
  ```bash
  mvn clean install
  ```
  ```bash
  ./mvnw spring-boot:run
  ```
- **Example Application**:
  - Repository: [stockgeeks/spring-boot-kafka-confluent-cloud](https://github.com/stockgeeks/spring-boot-kafka-confluent-cloud)
  - Contains Avro schema and generated Java code for Kafka integration.
